channel.title: Tools on Cringe Live
channel.description: Recent content in Tools on Cringe Live

item.title: Cheatsheet
item.description: Cheatsheet # HTML Snippets # Markdown: Display Small Image with Link to Large Image # [![An AI generated image.](small.png)](large.png) Collapsible Section # <details> <summary>Click to reveal images</summary> </details> Python Snippets # Use catppuccin Theme in Matplotlib # import mplcatppuccin import matplotlib as mpl import matplotlib.pyplot as plt mpl.style.use("latte") Update PyTorch # # Uninstalls the specified Python packages (torch, torchaudio, torchvision, # torchtext, torchdata) if they are already installed in your Python # environment.
